title: Moving left, right, up, down inside a board from a PC
excerpt:
scrolling up and down + Left & Right from PC is not smooth! especially when you have in your board many columns… 
i would like you to considering adding up, down, left, right arrows buttons that every time user will clic…

posts.author: TsachiD (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:
scrolling up and down + Left & Right from PC is not smooth! especially when you have in your board many columns…
i would like you to considering adding up, down, left, right arrows buttons that every time user will click them, they will take the page in sections to the desired direction the user wants
this will enable easy navigating inside the page

thanks
Tsachi
